items.name: Dripping Pentagram Back Sigil
items.description: A back-mounted occult sigil inspired by hand-painted pentagrams. Features uneven lines, long dripping streaks and a worn, dark look. Made to sit flat on the avatar’s back for dark/fantasy outfits.
